title: Saleor TMA Frontend - Telegram Init Data Validation

tasks.description: Set up Vitest testing framework and configuration
tasks.acceptance: Vitest is installed and configured, test script added to package.json, and a basic test passes

tasks.description: Create utility function for generating URL-encoded Telegram init data with current auth_date
tasks.acceptance: Function generateMockInitData() in src/utils/initData.ts returns URL-encoded string with format 'auth_date=<timestamp>&user=<url-encoded-json>&hash=test' where auth_date is current timestamp

tasks.description: Fix getTelegramInitHeader() in src/api/index.ts to return raw URL-encoded init data instead of JSON and add expiration warning (dev mode only)
tasks.acceptance: getTelegramInitHeader() returns window.Telegram.WebApp.initData directly when available, or VITE_DEV_INIT_DATA when set, and logs warning to console when auth_date older than 24 hours in development mode

tasks.description: Modify mockEnv.ts to use utility function for generating mock init data when VITE_DEV_INIT_DATA is not set
tasks.acceptance: When VITE_DEV_INIT_DATA is not set, mockEnv.ts initData equals generateMockInitData() output from src/utils/initData.ts

tasks.description: Create automated tests for Telegram init data utility and header function
tasks.acceptance: Test file src/utils/__tests__/initData.test.ts verifies: (a) generateMockInitData() produces valid URL-encoded format with current auth_date, (b) getTelegramInitHeader() returns correct values for different scenarios, (c) expiration warning is logged when auth_date > 24 hours in development mode
